mapper.insert: insert into follow(follower_id, following_id, date) values(#{follower_id}, #{following_id}, #{date})
mapper.delete: delete from follow where follower_id = #{followerId} and following_id = #{followingId}
mapper.select: select id, follower_id, following_id, date from follow where follower_id = #{followerId} and following_id = #{followingId}
select id, follower_id, following_id, date from follow where follower_id = #{followerId} order by id desc
select id, follower_id, following_id, date from follow where following_id = #{followingId} order by id desc
select count(*) from follow where follower_id = #{followerId}
select count(*) from follow where following_id = #{followingId}
